emergency_definition: Power outages affecting the whole property
non_emergency_routing_rules: Take the caller's name, number, and a brief description of the issue. We'll call back the next business day.
after_hours_flow_summary: Take the caller's name, number, and a brief description of the issue. We'll call back the next business day.
questions_or_unknowns: Commercial accounts: residential or commercial property
notes: For commercial accounts, ask whether it's a residential or commercial property upfront — it affects who we dispatch.
